data.content: Fixed parent auto-close gap for c051-style scene runs: regroom now evaluates the starting beat (not only ancestors), so completing all children in a parent session can auto-close/ship the parent. Added regression test for starting-parent auto-close. Validated with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Landed on main and pushed.
